name: Delirium
short_description: Delirium is a psychological horror game set in a suburban house. After a mysterious explosion, reality begins to unravel.
detailed_description:
Delirium is a first-person psychological horror walking simulator with a focus on building tension. The game takes approximately 30-40 minutes to complete.

Gameplay

Explore a suburban house that reacts to your every move. Watch analog horror style TV broadcasts. Solve light puzzles such as unlocking doors and accessing new areas.

The game is a linear experience with a focus on atmosphere and tension. It is NOT narratively or mechanically complex - it's more like a terrifying carnival ride.

Features

  • No cheap jumpscares

    Nothing is chasing you and nothing will jump out of nowhere

  • Physical interactions

    Interact with doors and objects with immersive amnesia-like controls

  • TV broadcasts

    Watch analog horror inspired TV broadcasts

  • High-quality 3D audio

    Enjoy an immersive horror soundscape

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish
*languages with full audio support
